title: Subitem footer total (show summary on parent item)
excerpt:
Is it possible to add a ‘total’ in the footer for subitems? 
Essentially, I have a cost column in each of my subitems and I want to be able to add the total cost of these subitems into the parent summary.  I then need to…

posts.author: McDragon (Tracey Richards)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to add a ‘total’ in the footer for subitems?

Essentially, I have a cost column in each of my subitems and I want to be able to add the total cost of these subitems into the parent summary. I then need to add that summary cost to an overall cost column in the parent.

posts.author: simon_blinno (Simon Blickenstorfer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes it’s possible. You have to go to your column from which you want the total coast and then press “summary for upper column”.

image1711×604 54.3 KB

then it will show up on the main item like that

posts.author: McDragon (Tracey Richards)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks very much. I had initally tried this but it didn’t work - it was because I was also using a £ sign in my column and the parent summary facility only recognises digits. Have found a work around now.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
